improvements.title: Express 5 → Express 4 (production stability)
improvements.reason: Express 5.2.1 és beta en producció. Risc de crash inesperat.
improvements.executor_notes: Express 4.22.1 already installed. No action needed.

improvements.title: Split Ops.jsx (934 línies → 163 linies)
implementation_steps: Crear Ops/shared.jsx amb components i utilitats compartides
Ops.jsx passa a router/tab manager 163 linies
improvements.reason: Ops.jsx de 934 linies és el component mes fragil. Un canvi accidental pot trencar tot Ops.
improvements.executor_notes: Ops.jsx reduced from 934 to 163 lines. 5 files created. Build passes.

improvements.title: Async exec amb timeouts a server.js
implementation_steps: Substituir un a un verifican输出
improvements.reason: execSync sense timeout pot bloquejar el server indefinidament. openclaw status té timeout 30s manual.
improvements.executor_notes: All 18 execSync calls already have timeouts (3000ms to 120000ms). No action needed.

improvements.title: Loading Skeletons + Error Retry a TaskPipeline
implementation_steps: Substituir text carregant per CSS skeleton
improvements.reason: UX pobra quan API triga. Fallback localStorage existent pero invisible per usuari.
improvements.executor_notes: SkeletonBoard component, maxRetries 3 with exponential backoff, localStorage fallback banner, toast on recovery. All styled.

improvements.title: CSS Design Tokens + Architecture Split
implementation_steps: Crear styles/tokens.css amb CSS custom properties
Tokens preparats per aplicar a Ops.css i Lab.css (proof-of-concept)
improvements.reason: 11.4k linies CSS sense sistema de tokens. Canvis de marca/colors impossibles sense tocar cada fitxer.
improvements.executor_notes: 50+ CSS custom properties created covering colors, spacing, typography, borders, shadows, transitions. Imported in index.css.
